html:
Illustration by Kim Pope

The bestiary provides a listing of all known animal types from the world of A Song of Ice and Fire which are directly referenced in the text or appear on coats of arms. Most of the animals inhabiting the known world are similar to those of real life. Other creatures include plants and fungi.

Contents

  • 1 Special Animals
  • 2 Domesticated
  • 3 Mammals
  • 4 Birds
  • 5 Reptiles
  • 6 Fish and Marine Life
  • 7 Arthropods
  • 8 Annelids
  • 9 Notes
  • 10 References

Special Animals[ ]

Special animals of particular note, with their own articles:

Land Mammals:

  • Aurochs
  • Direwolf
  • Little Valyrian (lemur)
  • Mammoth
  • Pouch tiger (thylacine)
  • Shadowcat
  • Unicorn
  • Zorse

Reptiles and Birds:

  • Lizard-lion
  • Phantom tortoise
  • Walking lizard (dromaeosaurid)
  • Raven
    • White raven

Insects:

  • Bloodfly
  • Manticore (insect)

Marine Life:

  • Kraken
  • Leviathan (giant whale)
  • Old Men of the River (giant turtle)

Magical creatures:

  • Dragon
    • Firewyrm
    • Wyvern
  • Giant ice spider

  • Basilisk
